ADMSN_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Admission Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The basic types of admission for Inpatient hospital stays and a code indicating the priority of this 
admission. 

SHORT NAME: ADMSN_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: ADMSN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header
